meta.title: FAQ | Prestivio
meta.description: Frequently asked questions about loans and Prestivio services.

page.title: Frequently asked questions
page.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions.

g1.question: Who is Prestivio?
g1.answer: An independent credit broker, registered in the OAM Register.

g2.question: How much does the consultation cost?
g2.answer: The first consultation is free and without obligation.

g3.question: How soon do I get an answer?
g3.answer: For personal loans, the outcome arrives in 48 hours.

d1.question: What documents are needed?
d1.answer: Identity, tax code, income documentation, and IBAN.

d2.question: Can I submit documents online?
d2.answer: Yes, the process is completely digital.

r1.question: Is the rate fixed or variable?
r1.answer: For personal loans it is always fixed. For mortgages you can choose.

r2.question: Can I repay early?
r2.answer: Yes, early repayment is always possible.

r3.question: What is the TAN?
r3.answer: The Nominal Annual Rate is the pure rate applied to the principal.

s1.question: What is portability?
s1.answer: Transferring the mortgage from one bank to another at no cost.

s2.question: What is debt consolidation?
s2.answer: Merging all loans into one, with an often lower installment.
